description: Style NoteSuper soft vintage leather and a variety of hues to choose from, wallets from fossil are the way to go for a look that chic and versatile effortlessly. Spice up your outfit with these funky yet conventional wallets and get ready to be on top of your game!Product DetailsGreen wallet that has a zipped compartment, flap on the left with a buttoned closure, twelve card holders and an id card holder, flap on the right with a pocket and buttoned closure, stitch detailing and brand name on a metallic badge on the frontMaterial and CareVintage leatherWipe with clean, damp cloth to remove dirtDimensions:10 cm x 19 cm
